tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Standard Tuning, No Capo

Intro: [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] x4

[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]
She's got both hands in her pocket[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]F#m[/ch]
And she wont look at you, won't look you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]F#m[/ch]
She hides true love,  en su bolsillo[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
Shes got a halo around her finger, around you[/tab]

Bridge:
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
You know that I love you boy, hot like Mexico, rejoice[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]F#m[/ch]
At this point I gotta choose nothing to loose[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't call my name, don't call my name, Alejandro[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'm not your babe, I'm not your babe, Fernando[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                     [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't wanna kiss, don't wanna touch, just smoke one cigarette[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]
Don't call my name, don't call my name, Roberto[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]
Alejandro, Alejandro[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]
(Just stop. please, just let me go. Alejandro, just let me go)[/tab]

[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]F#m[/ch]
She's not broken, she's just a baby[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]F#m[/ch]
But her boyfriend's like a dad, just like a dad[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
Draw those flames that, burn before him[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]F#m[/ch]
Now he's gonna find fly a kite, gonna fool you bad[/tab]


Bridge
